# Appendix D: Feature Status and 2.0 Gaps

## Chapter status

| Chapter | Topic | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | operation, modes, editing and previous entries | partial — display and base modes are complete; complex, vector-coordinate, graph-type and differentiation mode settings remain |
| 2 | variables and stored data | partial — the 2.0 typed object store and reserved namespace remain |
| 3 | mathematics, calculus and comparisons | partial — generic calculus interpolation probability and utility commands remain |
| 4 | Cartesian graphing, drawing, formats and persistence | equivalent |
| 5 | polar graphing | missing — scheduled for work package 14.5 |
| 6 | parametric graphing | missing — scheduled for work package 14.5 |
| 7 | differential-equation graphing | missing — scheduled for work package 14.5 |
| 8 | physical and user constants plus conversions | partial — user-defined constants remain |
| 9 | strings and characters | partial — equation conversion and extended character sets remain |
| 10 | number bases and Boolean operations | partial — full entry/arithmetic modes and Boolean operations remain |
| 11 | complex numbers | partial — complete display modes and collection propagation remain |
| 12 | lists | partial — dimension fill descending sort and conversions remain |
| 13 | matrices and vectors | partial — row operations decompositions eigensystems and coordinate modes remain |
| 14 | equation, polynomial and simultaneous solving | partial — full equation/variable solver workflow remains |
| 15 | statistics and statistical plots | partial — regression families forecasts command forms and xyline remain |
| 16 | calculator programming | partial — labels jumps repeat menus and complete I/O remain |
| 17 | worked application examples | partial — examples depend on graph calculus matrix and programming gaps tracked by their owning chapters |
| 18 | memory management | partial — typed sizes browsing and individual deletion are implemented; 14.9 link selection and backup workflows remain |
| 19 | calculator linking | hardware-dependent — item transfer and backup require emulator loopback plus separately reported hardware validation |
| appendices | functions, system variables and errors | partial — the command ledger is complete but implementation gaps remain |

## Open work packages

Every non-`equivalent` entry from the Free85 2.0 parity gap report (spec/free85/v2-parity-gaps.yaml), sorted by work package owner. `equivalent` areas are already complete and are omitted here (see Appendix A for the full catalog).

- **graph.polar** [missing, owner `14.5`, area graph]: polar edit plot explore trace table and analysis
- **graph.parametric** [missing, owner `14.5`, area graph]: parametric edit plot explore trace table and analysis
- **graph.diffeq** [missing, owner `14.5`, area graph]: differential-equation edit plot explore and solve
- **coordinates.modes** [partial, owner `14.5`, area coordinates]: rectangular polar cylindrical and spherical display/conversion modes
- **list.complete** [partial, owner `14.6`, area collections]: dimension fill descending sort sequence and conversions
- **matrix.complete** [partial, owner `14.6`, area collections]: resize fill random row operations augmentation norms LU condition and eigensystem
- **vector.complete** [partial, owner `14.6`, area collections]: dimension fill coordinate systems and list conversion
- **complex.collections** [partial, owner `14.6`, area collections]: valid complex and element-wise operations across collections
- **solver.complete** [partial, owner `14.7`, area solver]: equations variables guesses bounds results and graphical exploration
- **statistics.models** [partial, owner `14.7`, area statistics]: linear logarithmic exponential power and polynomial regressions with forecasts
- **statistics.commands** [partial, owner `14.7`, area statistics]: command-line one/two-variable analysis sorting and result variables
- **statistics.xyline** [missing, owner `14.7`, area statistics]: connected paired-data plot
- **program.control** [partial, owner `14.8`, area programming]: labels Goto Repeat skip instructions menus and full conditionals
- **program.io** [partial, owner `14.8`, area programming]: GetKey Pause Prompt positioned Output string and virtual-device IO
- **program.catalog** [partial, owner `14.8`, area programming]: all 2.0 operations callable from programs
- **equation.string** [missing, owner `14.8`, area strings]: equation/string round-trip conversion
- **constants.user** [missing, owner `14.9`, area constants]: create edit name use and delete user constants
- **characters.extended** [partial, owner `14.9`, area characters]: original Greek and international glyph palettes
- **memory.complete** [partial, owner `14.9`, area memory]: complete typed memory workflows
- **link.transfer** [hardware-dependent, owner `14.9`, area link]: Free85 item selection send receive duplicate handling and interruption
- **link.backup** [hardware-dependent, owner `14.9`, area link]: transactional Free85 backup and restore
- **release.2.0** [missing, owner `14.10`, area release]: reproducible zero-gap Free85 2.0 release
